beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: Lyra, please tell me you did not charge them two thousand gold for that room.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: I said the room could cost that much. Very different thing.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: Lyra.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Okay, fine! It usually costs half that.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: But my axe is important to me, and they looked capable! I panicked a little!
[i]Sera sighs.[/i]

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: No use crying over spilled milk. I'm glad it turned out okay.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: Oh... hey. I see you got a room for the night like I suggested.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: I hope Lyra's been treating you well?

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: Um...

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: I was afraid of that.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: For what it is worth, she is sorry. In her own very loud way.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: Good. That matters more than you probably think right now.

options.text: She made me fetch her axe for it.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: I heard.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: She should have asked plainly, but I'm glad you made it back safely.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: Still, please take it easy for a while. Capable or not, you were badly hurt yesterday.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: That said... having a capable adventurer around would be helpful.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: There is a quest board outside the tavern. People post requests there, but a lot of them go unfinished.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: If you ever need more money, or just something to do, you could consider looking at it.
The quest board is now available.
Sera and Lyra can now join you in dungeons.
